rationale: TASK-055 acceptance is met: Build Contract v2 fields are implemented in schemas/types/writers, feedback builds require approved diff_table rows, implementation builds require closure_brief, explicit consumes/produces fields feed graph DAG/reconciliation, lint enforces v2 requirements only for schema_version >= 2 so historical builds remain legacy, and smoke tests cover success and failure paths.

issues.summary: Pi must reload before the live codewiki_build tool schema accepts new diff_table and closure_brief inputs.
